blocks.content: Raid Control (1)
West Country ranker, Little Witch.
Shirone knew her well, having kept track of rankers as he leveled up.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If she knows me…
It means they met in some way in reality.
Little Witch turned her eerie gaze to Shirone's friends behind him.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: What, what's this?
Destroyer707 and his group were familiar with Little Witch, but meeting her eyes gave them chills.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: She's just a machine, but this feels weird.
Shirone also sensed the strange atmosphere emanating from Little Witch.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I get it.
She was Mitochondrial Eve.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Having reached the level of a bat in High Gear, Shirone could read the spirit contained in matter.
This also means…
Uorin was using this world to understand the real world.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Everyone… please step outside for a moment.
Destroyer707 looked puzzled, but Shirone didn't take his eyes off Little Witch.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Fermi, you too.
Yolga's Son shrugged and left the room, followed by Destroyer707 without a word.
Once the door closed, Shirone asked, "You…"

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: There's no need to talk about reality. All our actions and conversations are logged.
Technically, the designer can check everything that happens in High Gear.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The only thing they can't check is the mind.
The quantum world is unobservable.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Alright. Why are you here? You're from the Ascension Guild. This is East Country's hideout.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I requested it. I wanted to meet you. You're planning to defeat the Operator, right?

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: I requested it. I wanted to meet you. You're planning to defeat the Operator, right?
Little Witch laughed dryly.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Haha. That girl is really concerned about you. But it'll be tough. She might seem like a teenage girl, but she's the strongest in High Gear.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So, what do you want to say?

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Shall I help you?
Shirone read the madness in Little Witch.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Are you going to betray the Operator?

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Don't say such hurtful things. I might use people, but I don't betray them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Thinking about their differences, Shirone realized there was no need and shook his head.
'Empress of Kashan, Uorin.'
The moment you define her, she will exploit that gap to control your mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So how will you help? Even you can't beat the Operator here.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Still naive, I see." That's why she liked him.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: You know who I am. The Operator probably suspects too. Just as you have special senses, I have a trump card.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A trump card?
Little Witch mimicked a gun with her hand, aiming at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Real-world murder. Want to know who the Operator is? I guarantee you'll never find out. Even a dreamer can't trace the undercoder's floor. But I can.
History search.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: If you say the word, I'll help. We can drag the Operator here and unearth the apocalypse.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Fermi, you bastard…'
He didn't know how much information they exchanged, but it was clearly a mutually satisfying deal.
He had no complaints, but dealing with Uorin was unsettling.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What deal did you make?
Little Witch blinked for a while before speaking.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: I don't know much. The situation with the apocalypse, and in return, I…
Shirone interrupted.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Not that.
What deal did you make with Havitz?
Silence fell.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You disappeared in Kashan. You must have met and made some deal. Otherwise, it's strange you're still alive.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: External matters aren't for here. You have things you don't want to reveal too.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Of course. But once you mentioned real-world murder, that doesn't matter. I need to know what happened with Havitz. It's related to the Holy War, right?

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Why don't you ask?
Little Witch's voice was tinged with sadness.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Come to Kashan and ask me. Do you think I won't tell you? Why? Because you'll learn what Mitochondrial Eve is, and now you don't want to see my face?
'Why?'
Yahweh wasn't narrow-minded, but after learning everything through Omega, his heart didn't move.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: To be clear, it's not my fault. I did my best. Don't blame everything on me.
She still had no expression, but Shirone felt like she was crying.
She placed a card on the table.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: It's a pass for West Country's raid hunting grounds. Yolga's Son said you'd need it.
That was the deal.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: And again, I won't talk to you here. If you want to hear, come to Kashan. That's the only condition.
As Little Witch left, Shirone checked the card she left.
'West Country Free Pass.'
A moment later, Yolga's Son entered.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's Son
blocks.content: Did the conversation go well?
There was no need to report to Fermi, so Shirone said nothing.
Fermi shrugged and approached.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Well, good. You got it. With that, you can get two of the four legendary items. If you're lucky or use tricks.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is this?

It's literally a pass. Many hunting grounds in High Gear are monopolized by specific guilds. They issue passes and sell them to users from other countries. The Free Pass lets you enter all hunting grounds occupied by West Country.
Shirone took the West Country Free Pass.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: But I can't avoid conflicts with users. I'm from East Country. Do I have to party with them?
No choice. To beat the Operator, you need three things: skill, level, and equipment. Skill aside, our guild can help with the level. But there's still a 183-level gap.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Especially above level 300, each level difference is huge.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You need equipment to bridge that gap.

Yes. To face the Operator, you need four essential items: the energy gun Michelangelo, the strong armor Raphael, the metal wings Da Vinci, and the liquid eyes Donatello. These are called the four legendary items. Equipping them will narrow the gap.
Shirone understood.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What do I need to find in West Country?
Michelangelo and Donatello. West Country won't like it, so you need to go now.
Myth' level raids adjust difficulty based on the average user level. It's always extremely difficult, though.
Adjusting difficulty means…
Like Mid Gear, it's a hunting ground isolated from the outside. Once inside, even other Ascension Guild members can't enter. I can't guarantee what happens inside.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Got it.
Shirone stood up.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What about Destroyer707?
He'll be useful to Golden Wheel. We'll level him up to Magnan for the Solar War. You focus on finding the legendary items.
Time was tight for both, so Shirone immediately left the room and exited the bar.
Destroyer707 asked, "Did the conversation go well?"
Fortunately, he didn't seem too discouraged by Little Witch's cold demeanor.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Yeah. It looks like I need to go to West Country.
After briefly summarizing the conversation with Fermi, Destroyer707 nodded.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Hmm, that's certainly a clever approach. I think it's the only way to stand a chance against the Operator.

Death Princess added, "It's really difficult, so the success rate is fifty-fifty. Plus, the chances of getting legendary items are extremely low, so you probably won't get them on the first try. But I'll pray you do."
Shirone had a rough idea of the structure.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright, then…
Recalling the time left until the Solar War, Shirone followed Aegis outside.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Taking the train from Atogram is the fastest. You need to be at least level 200 to be faster than the train. I'll guide you.
When they reached the square, reporters swarmed, but Aegis's electronic interference kept them at bay.
After buying tickets and boarding the train, everyone entered Mid Gear.
Ah.
This method would prevent the journey from feeling tedious.
Some users stayed in their seats to enjoy the journey, but they were all from West Country.

blocks.speaker: Yahweh2
blocks.content: Hey, it's Yahweh2. Did you get on the wrong train? Why are you in Democracy? You should be in East Country.
To avoid suspicion, Shirone entered the Mid Gear capsule.
'Energy charging.'
Wires connected, and even with his eyes closed, he saw blue electricity in his vision.
Charging complete.
They were in West Country.
The capital, Democracy.
It was the first city for users who left Atogram and chose West Country.
Now able to distinguish parts, Shirone saw a wide range of levels.
Most were from West Country, so he couldn't see guild marks, but there were a few East Country users.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There are more people here than in Atogram.
The rumor that 40% of West Country users gathered here wasn't an exaggeration.
The scenery was a mix of half-hologram buildings and numerous advertisements.
Following Fermi's instructions, they reached the square where people were recruiting for raid parties.
Recruiting for the Gambler's Sanctuary! Minimum level 280.
Going to the Valley of the Cursed. Need 3 more.
Preference for those with Aegis option activated.
The street was quiet, but the wide-area communication echoed in Shirone's ears.
'Dizzying.'
After adjusting the frequency, he found silence and used the filtering function to input 'Ergos.'
Looking for challengers for Ergos. Low levels welcome.
Contact codename Mafia.
Ignoring other voices, Shirone responded to the first information he received.
He contacted the man.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Yes. Are you interested?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I am, but I'm new. Can I learn as I go?

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Hmm, what's your level?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Level 100. I'm equipped with Suicide Speed Machine. All selective options are unlocked.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Mafia responded positively, perhaps appreciating his effort to not seem like a beginner.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Let's see. Where are you?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm under the clock tower.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: We'll come to you.
After waiting about a minute, a group pushed through the crowd from the east side of the square.
'Codename Mafia.'
There were other codenames, but being from West Country, he couldn't get detailed information.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Hey, it's East Country.
Realizing the same, Mafia's group stopped.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Wait, that's… Yahweh2? Didn't you guys check the bulletin board? It was crazy yesterday.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No, I was hunting all day. What happened?

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: That guy's from Golden Wheel.
A man with the codename DexGamsung approached Shirone.

blocks.speaker: DexGamsung
blocks.content: Hey, did you get on the wrong train? Why are you in Democracy? You should be in East Country.
I came here on purpose. I heard I could get Michelangelo by defeating Ergos. Can we team up?

blocks.speaker: DexGamsung
blocks.content: Haha! This guy's a real oddball. Are you stupid? How can East and West hunt together? There's no hostile action judgment, but you think we won't stab you in the back?
That's why I'm asking. Let's do it together.
DexGamsung, looking baffled, tapped his silver metal head.

blocks.speaker: DexGamsung
blocks.content: Just go. What nonsense is this? If we team up with you, they won't even issue a pass.
I have a pass.
Shirone pulled out a card.
Here, take a look.
Leaning in to examine the card, DexGamsung's AI displayed the information.
West Country Free Pass. Approved by Ascension Guild.
He stood still for a long time, as if frozen.
